description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image code.crearecomputing.com:5050/hearingproducts/tabsint/tabsint-admin/tabsint-ci:v3.3 with pull_policy always, defines the stages install_deps, test, build, and package, and sets the variable ADMIN_DIR=admin. Add an Install Dependencies job in the install_deps stage that runs `npm i` then `npm run set-config tabsint.json`, stores src/tabsintConfig.json and src/version.json as artifacts named admin for 1 hour, and runs on all branches except master and any release/* branches. Add a Pull Config job in the .pre stage that runs `ADMIN_REPO="https://code.crearecomputing.com/hearingproducts/tabsint/tabsint-admin.git"`, writes credentials to .git-credentials, configures git credential helper, clones $ADMIN_REPO into $ADMIN_DIR, echoes the current git describe, extracts VERSION from package.json with `jq --raw-output '.version' package.json`, copies the versioned tabsint.json, and archives $ADMIN_DIR/, .git-credentials, and config/ as artifacts for 1 hour. Add a Test job in the test stage that needs Install Dependencies, runs `npm run test`, and uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG pulling node_modules/ and .npm/. Add a Build job in the build stage that depends on Install Dependencies and Test, runs `echo "$TABSINT_GITLAB_CREDENTIALS" >> ~/.git-credentials`, `git config --global credential.helper 'store --file ~/.git-credentials'`, `export CORDOVA_PLUGIN_CREARE_CHA_CREDENTIALS=${CORDOVA_PLUGIN_CREARE_CHA_CREDENTIALS}`, `echo $CORDOVA_PLUGIN_CREARE_CHA_CREDENTIALS`, `npm run build.android --tabverbose`, and `npm run dist.android.dev`, caches node_modules/ and .npm/, and publishes the dist/ directory as a 1‑week artifact. Add a Beta Release job in the package stage that only runs on branches matching the regex ^release/[0-9]+(?:.[0-9]+)+$, extracts VERSION with `jq --raw-output '.version' package.json`, and triggers a downstream pipeline via a curl POST to https://code.crearecomputing.com/api/v4/projects/676/trigger/pipeline with token, ref=master, variables BETA=true and RELEASE_BRANCH=release/$VERSION. Finally, add a Full Release job in the package stage that only runs on tags, is manual, and triggers the same downstream pipeline with variable RELEASE=true via curl. All jobs use the shared cache (key $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, paths node_modules/ and .npm/, policy pull) and the global cache policy pull‑push.
